{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321214137C2DAA8F4AFC7C6435437"}"},"total":3314},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611206976619889433","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"后宫文，算刘皇叔吧。作者描绘…的词汇量是我目前见过最多的。
作者文笔不错，在大量的后宫文里面加入了一些修炼的桥段。而且挺能把握节奏的，主角400多章了还在发展后宫。
因为一直听书，睡一觉起来发现播过好几章了也没有什么影响，查一下大致就可以继续看。
至于主角作为反派，很少看到出手杀死敌人的桥段。
[偷笑][偷笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772124690,"group_id":"7449317365319207961","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"欲图写小说中……大脑请开机，心脏请开机，眼睛请开机，手指请开机，肾上腺素请开机……开机请开机。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1Qjuz90Tpnk7tqRCSI3EFsgAss7Wu+5lFQ+GJLKrCSf","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/55515e54f80e49878923cfe3ef1e2811~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619233&x-signature=%2FZtsTOTVXjcrNgtxCXkFrIhLhA8%3D","user_id":"4388892419837166","user_name":"渡火飞焉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4388892419837166","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7449317365319207961","book_info":{"abstract":"开局成为富二代，拥有美丽妻子，还有校花小姨子。
可徐沐却高兴不起来。
只因他成了书中无脑反派，打骂妻子，让龙王妹妹住狗窝，龙王归来，骨灰都给他扬了。
好在徐沐觉醒正义系统，他要改变必死的结局。
妻子是需要疼爱的，小姨子当然要住进别墅的被窝。
龙王归来后，看到的是恩恩爱爱的一家人。
徐沐发现，除了龙王，还有很多主角一一出现，都开始针对他，他被迫反击。
你有几个倾国倾城的师姐？
抱歉，现在她们是我师姐了。
你兵王回归，寻找白月光？
抱歉，你的白月光，早把我当成她的白月光了。

":108589,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":186479,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":6830},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7466788643673129790","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"那牛逼，真的牛逼。这个是我头一次看见能把这个毒点转换成笑点的，很多设定你一眼看上去你就会觉得绷不住，角色的三观更是一个比一个逆天，但是我还是很愿意看下去，因为他真的很好笑，你想找爽点？可以，这里面到处都是爽点。你想找毒点？那你放眼望去全都是都不用刻意去找，毕竟他都是这种套路了，你还能要求什么呢？但是他有独一无二的笑点。我头一次见到主角会因为那个配角的不断嘴臭而蚌埠住的，😂主角真的是个神人。总之建议大家看一看，真的很好笑，很tm好笑。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738500675,"group_id":"7449317365319207961","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzFZ9T5OTkC2GJSUUa6lEO9SRoJf86jFHEKB9PwZa1k3","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614448&x-signature=9AK6tJoPatlC5h8wRFq%2F%2FD9Y0TE%3D","user_id":"1706094297094687","user_name":"爱吃风吹酱肉的陈非"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1706094297094687","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7449317365319207961","book_info":{"abstract":"开局成为富二代，拥有美丽妻子，还有校花小姨子。

我倒是没有打抱不平，只是觉得要是8.1分的书都这么好看就好了，书荒中…"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772434244,"group_id":"7449317365319207961","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"223929009707325"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7449317365319207961","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"28"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读73小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":128518,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":261240,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7612530456115020568","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真挺好看的，很轻松，又很有阅读冲动。
第一，系统点增加方式很合理，张弛有度，不会显得太幼稚无脑或者是故作高深。
第二，情节，叙事也很不错，虽然没有特别巨大的戏剧冲突，但读起来很带感，现在也是天天追更。
第三，人物刻画的不错，虽然是是爽文，但是没有无脑不合逻辑的剧情，没有多少毒点。

小缺点：目前有三个半女角色吃上肉了，其他的吃肉的太少了，加快点节奏啊！！！","text_exts":[{"e":35,"s":33,"text":"张弛","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BC%A0%E5%BC%9B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774100497C6435437%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227612530456115020568%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227449317365319207961%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BC%A0%E5%BC%9B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772434100,"group_id":"7449317365319207961","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"两岸猿声啼不住，轻舟已过万重山","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7gMMf3/HU+t76UrAe+qKhs=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0a837736538c4566afa30c51ccda7cde~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619386&x-signature=xh7hCmzAPhumi%2FT1XlTPaKdHNfc%3D","user_id":"223929009707325","user_name":"闲暇时看看天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"223929009707325","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":75,"fan_ranklist_title":"铁杆粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7449317365319207961","book_info":{"abstract":"开局成为富二代，拥有美丽妻子，还有校花小姨子。
